title: Gigachad Golem
description: Replaces the Iron Golem texture with a Gigachad
body:
# Short Description
This resource pack changes the Iron Golem’s appearance, giving it a confident look while keeping Minecraft’s pixel art style. It’s playful and blends well with the game world.
# What It Changes
Entity: Iron Golem. Scope: Visual texture replacement only
# Visual Design
A confident, striking face with bold features and a determined expression.
# Compatibility & Performance
Fully compatible with the base game.
No performance impact, even at higher resolutions.
Works well with shaders; textures remain clear and readable.
